import wandb
import mlflow

LOG_INTERVAL = 100

def train_model(model, dataloader, epochs: int):
    for epoch in range(epochs):
        epoch_loss = 0.0
        for batch_idx, (data, target) in enumerate(dataloader):
            loss = model.train_step(data, target)
            epoch_loss += loss
            if batch_idx % LOG_INTERVAL == 0:
                wandb.log({"train_loss": loss, "epoch": epoch, "batch": batch_idx})
        wandb.log({"epoch_loss": epoch_loss / len(dataloader), "epoch": epoch})

def train_with_mlflow(model, dataloader, epochs: int):
    for epoch in range(epochs):
        epoch_loss = 0.0
        for batch_idx, (data, target) in enumerate(dataloader):
            loss = model.train_step(data, target)
            epoch_loss += loss
        avg_loss = epoch_loss / len(dataloader)
        mlflow.log_metric("train_loss", avg_loss, step=epoch)

def evaluate_and_log(model, val_loader):
    total_accuracy = 0.0
    count = 0
    for data, target in val_loader:
        accuracy = model.evaluate(data, target)
        total_accuracy += accuracy
        count += 1
    wandb.log({"val_accuracy": total_accuracy / count})
    mlflow.log_metric("val_accuracy", total_accuracy / count)
